record.field:
BlogPost = model.env['blog.post'] FieldDate = model.env['ir.qweb.field.date']
website = request.website.get_current_website() dynamic_filter = model.env.context.get('dynamic_filter') # limit = model.env.context.get('limit') # search_domain = model.env.context.get('search_domain') # order = model.env.context.get('order') order = request.params.get('order') meta_data = dynamic_filter._get_filter_meta_data()
# domain = [('website_published', '=', True)] + website.website_domain() + (search_domain or []) # posts = BlogPost.search(domain, limit=limit, order=order) posts = dynamic_filter._get_blog_posts(website, order, model.env.context)
res_posts = [] for post in posts: res_post = post._read_format(['id', 'name', 'website_url', 'subtitle', 'cover_properties', 'write_date', 'blog_id'])[0]
data = {} for field_name in meta_data.keys(): field = BlogPost._fields.get(field_name) if field: data[field_name] = res_post[field_name] data['call_to_action_url'] = res_post['website_url'] data['blog_name'] = post['blog_id'].name data['blog_url'] = '/blog/%s' % post['blog_id'].id data['_record'] = post res_posts.append(data)
response = res_posts
